subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon! In every path a guide is necessary, and in every way a companion is required. If thou art determined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بافق اعلی در هر سبیلی دلیلی لازم و در هر طریقی رفیقی واجب اگر عزم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Manifestation of God as sun
